name: Where Experts Disagree, Models Fail: Detecting Implicit Legal Citations in French Court Decisions
summary: arXiv:2603.22973v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Applying computational methods to law at scale requires separating genuine legal reasoning from surface similarity. We study this through a concr...
description: arXiv:2603.22973v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Applying computational methods to law at scale requires separating genuine legal reasoning from surface similarity. We study this through a concrete task: detecting implicit citations of the French Civil Code, where a court applies a statutory rule without naming it: a post-hoc question about the reasoning a court actually used. We release a b...
author: Avrile Floro (UPHF), Tamara Dhorasoo (UPHF), Soline Pellez (UPHF), Nils Holzenberger
